title: 1.1: Refactors Dot11Elt.dispatch_hook() to use generic registered_ies lookup with delegation to Dot11EltVendorSpecific.dispatch_hook in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.2: Adds Dot11EltVendorSpecific.dispatch_hook classmethod that routes Microsoft OUI (0x0050f2) elements by type in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.3: Changes Dot11EltMicrosoftWPA to inherit from Dot11EltVendorSpecific instead of Dot11Elt in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.4: Replaces all 3 duplicated cipher suite field definitions (group_cipher_suite, nb_pairwise_cipher_suites, pairwise_cipher_suites) in Dot11EltMicrosoftWPA with shared ones in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.5: Replaces all 2 duplicated AKM field definitions (nb_akm_suites, akm_suites) in Dot11EltMicrosoftWPA with shared ones in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.6: Guards register_variant() to skip registration when the element ID is already in registered_ies in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.7: Fixes Dot11EltRSN pmkids conditional threshold from '>= 18' to '>= 2' in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.8: Adds group_management_cipher_suite ConditionalField to Dot11EltRSN in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.9: Standardizes ID fields in all 4 element subclasses (Dot11EltRSN, Dot11EltCountry, Dot11EltRates, Dot11EltVendorSpecific) to use ByteEnumField with _dot11_info_elts_ids in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.10: Fixes vendor label capitalization from "vendor" to "Vendor" in _dot11_info_elts_ids in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.11: Cleans up scapy.fields import block to use parenthesized multi-line style in scapy/layers/dot11.py
1.12: Removes redundant byte-prefix fallback check for vendor IE (ID 221) in network_stats() in scapy/layers/dot11.py
4.1: Breaks existing packet parsing behavior for any of the 3 refactored Dot11 element classes (Dot11EltMicrosoftWPA, Dot11EltRSN, Dot11EltVendorSpecific) in scapy/layers/dot11.py
